title: Tutes-cn & Sweetink's Items
description: This mod adds several new dimension, weapons, armor sets, tools, food items, and medical supplies. It also supplements vanilla Minecraft items with practical crafting recipes.
body:
Overview:

This mod adds several new music discs, weapons, armor sets, tools, food items, and medical supplies. It also supplements vanilla Minecraft items with practical crafting recipes, such as Enchanted Golden Apples, Chainmail Armor sets, Nametags, Saddles, Music Discs, and Bone Meal (crafted from Poisonous Potatoes and Sugar).

The vast majority of items added by this mod are craftable. Items that cannot be crafted can be obtained by opening loot boxes with a chance-based drop system.

Weapon strengths are balanced relative to vanilla Minecraft. Different weapons and tools each have unique strengths and weaknesses, with some weapons featuring special right-click abilities.

Higher Minecraft versions expand upon this foundation with significant additional content, including: The Mario Dimension, The Classic Minecraft Dimension, more ores and metals, and a complete achievement system.

Current Status: The mod is actively in development. Some features from the lower-version iteration have not yet been ported.
